components_verified: Non-overlapping k-mer tokenization -> N/k tokens (shift == k)
Token language: species instruction + '=' + <CLS> + <TRUE>/<FALSE> classification template
Joint sequence+number forward (number tokens appended along length)
GSR classification head learns a synthetic signal (loss drops)

official_weights_load_verified.note: The from-scratch architecture is WEIGHT-COMPATIBLE with the authors' released checkpoint (GPT-2-style keys remapped, no transpose needed; vocab 19564; bias-free LN). The 11 missing keys are the freshly-initialized downstream cls_head + numerical/regression heads, as expected. This validates the re-implementation faithfully; only the downstream GSR accuracy remains to be run on real DeepGSR data + GPU.

real_data_pipeline_verified.counts: 11,302 positives + 11,302 negatives (matches paper Table S5 exactly)
real_data_pipeline_verified.signal_position: AATAAA centered at bp 300; negatives are hard negatives (same motif, non-signal context)
real_data_pipeline_verified.sanity_check: tiny 2-layer from-scratch model, 400 samples, 2 CPU epochs -> acc ~0.70, mcc ~0.41 (real signal, not 0.5, not the synthetic 1.0)
real_data_pipeline_verified.note: The real DeepGSR data now flows through the pipeline via `python data/download.py --gsr <task>`. Full-model + pretrained-weights + 10-epoch GPU run needed for the paper's 91.51%.

architecture_verification.known_fix: Paper overloads 'A'/'N' as both 1-mers and True/False class tokens; reproduction renames class tokens <TRUE>/<FALSE> to avoid an id collision (same role). Synthetic fallback hardened (weak signal + 15% label noise) and loudly labeled so it can never be mistaken for a paper result.

root_causes.cause: Essentially exact match (+0.05%); residual is single-seed / split variance

root_cause_investigation.summary: A base-model fine-tune plateaued at ~0.80 acc across 4 runs (lr 3e-5/1e-4, 10/12/20 epochs). Root-caused to a TOKENIZER MISMATCH: the reproduction's k-mer vocab ordering did not match the authors' released tokenizer, so the (bit-perfectly loaded) embedding table was indexed with wrong ids -> off-distribution inputs -> 80% ceiling.
root_cause_investigation.fix:
Rewrote the tokenizer to match TencentAILabHealthcare/DNAGPT dna_gpt/tokenizer.py EXACTLY: bases 'NAGCT' (N first), kmers = itertools.product(bases, repeat=i) for i in 1..k, vocab = 34 reserved (<...>,

=pad@0) + 19530 kmers = 19564 (matches checkpoint wte). Human instruction token = (Fig S2).
root_cause_investigation.result: Accuracy jumped 0.80 -> 0.9156, matching the paper's 0.9151 to +0.05%. This confirms both the tokenizer fix and the weight-compatibility of the from-scratch architecture.
